<COL 78f5ff>Board Quests are available!<.wrapped:
<COL 78f5ff>Board Quests are available!</COL>
In various locations you will see <COL ffdc78>Quest Boards</COL>.
Residents will make various requests with
<COL ffdc78>Board Quests</COL>.
Every day, we get new requests;
<COL ffdc78>Elimination Quests</COL> and <COL ffdc78>Delivery Quests</COL>.
Choose any you like.

<COL ffdc78>Elimination Quests</COL> are.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>Elimination Quests</COL> are aimed at the
suppression of monsters.
The target enemies are indicated by a green
circle on the Minimap.
<COL ffdc78>Delivery Quests</COL> are about obtaining specific items
and delivering them to a <COL ffdc78>Delivery Box</COL>.
However, if the time limit for the quest has
passed, the quest will automatically fail.
Please keep this in mind.

Quest priority can be set in the [<KC UI.wrapped:
Quest priority can be set in the [<KC UI_GAME_MENU>]
<COL ffdc78>Game Menu Quest Log</COL> inside the <COL ffdc78>Quest</COL>
main menu.
<COL ffdc78>You can set up to 3 Priority Quests.</COL>
If you are progressing through multiple quests at
the same time you should switch quest priority as
needed, so you can easily see the
information that you need.

All quests have a <COL ffdc78>Recommende.wrapped:
All quests have a <COL ffdc78>Recommended Level.</COL>
This will tell you the level of enemies that
appear in the quest area.
<COL ffdc78>Note that the recommended level not only means
your vocation level but also your equipment level.</COL>
Be sure to challenge quests that match your level.

You can change the size and zoom of \r\n.wrapped:
You can change the size and zoom of the <COL ffdc78>
Minimap </COL> at any time.
Change it according to the situation.
""Resizing"" Change Size with [<KC UI_MINIMAP>] +[<KC UI_MINIMAP_SCALING>] ""Zooming""
Change Zoom with [<KC UI_MINIMAP>] +[<KC UI_MAP_ZOOM_IN>／<KC UI_MAP_ZOOM_OUT>] ""Lock Size""
Lock Minimap with [<KC UI_MINIMAP>] +[<KC UI_MINIMAP_LOCK>]

On the upper-right corner of the screen.wrapped:
On the upper-right corner of the screen you
will find the <COL ffdc78>Minimap</COL>.
Here you can quickly see your position and the
position of enemies.
<COL ffdc78>The green circle at the center is your current
location, and small circles represent enemies.</COL>
Use it to plan your next move.

The <KC UI_GAME_MENU> <COL ffdc78>Game M.wrapped:
The <KC UI_GAME_MENU> <COL ffdc78>Game Menu</COL>
will show you details about quests in progress in
the <COL ffdc78>Quest Log</COL> under <COL ffdc78>Quest</COL>.
If you want to see the quest summary, current
objective, completion reward, etc.,
you can view it here.

<COL 78f5ff>World Quests are available!<.wrapped:
<COL 78f5ff>World Quests are available!</COL>
<COL ffdc78>World Quests</COL> are unique to each area, they can be
obtained from <COL ffdc78>Lestania News</COL>, talking to NPCs or
Encountering an enemy in the field.
Be sure to check the recommended level!
The target enemy of the <COL ffdc78>World Quest</COL>
appears on your Minimap as a
<COL 78f5ff>blue circle</COL>.

<COL ffdc78>Public Quests</COL>: give no.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>Public Quests</COL>: give normal rewards.
The location of the enemy and the quest rewards
can be seen by all players.
<COL ffdc78>Hidden Quests</COL>: give bonus rewards.
You need to search for yourself to find it; You
can also pay <COL ffdc78>Area Master</COL> for hints.
<COL ffdc78>Know that you can only get the bonus rewards once.</COL>

The White Dragon temple is divided into.wrapped:
The White Dragon temple is divided
into several districts.
<COL ffdc78>Central Plaza:</COL> Temple's heart, where all gather.
<COL ffdc78>Shopping District:</COL> Weapons, materials, and shops.
<COL ffdc78>Relay Station:</COL> Inns and taverns for relaxation.
<COL ffdc78>Workshop:</COL> Pawn item crafting workshop.
<COL ffdc78>Cave Harbor:</COL> Mooring for maritime vessels.
<COL ffdc78>Audience Chamber:</COL> The White Dragon
& important figures.

In the Game Menu, selecting <COL ffdc78>.wrapped:
In the Game Menu, selecting <COL ffdc78>World</COL>, then <COL ffdc78>Map</COL> will
show a wider view of the world than the Minimap.
To check various information useful to your
adventure (Party member's current locations,
enemies, buildings, place names or quest
objectives), make sure to use it.

\"Water\".\r\nThere is danger in the wat.wrapped:
"Water".
There is danger in the waters of Lestania.
The Brine hides in the water and drags
victims into the depths.
If that happens you will be returned to land.
However, if you fall into a deep pool or stream.
You may die.

There are dangerous places in the field..wrapped:
There are dangerous places in the field.
Proceed with caution.
There are places filled with poison and flames.
You will take damage or status abnormalities, like
"Poison" and "Burning".
Which will deal additional damage over time.
Always prepare ways to recover from those.

As you defeat monsters you will level up.wrapped:
As you defeat monsters you will level up.
<COL ffdc78>You will get Experience Points per kill</COL>, And
sometimes monsters will drop Items.
Fight monsters aggressively!
<COL ffdc78>Monsters have different attributes and weaknesses;
each monster is different as are their weaknesses.</COL>
Know your enemy and target their weak points.
Doing so will give you an advantage.

In Lestania there are many roaming monst.wrapped:
In Lestania there are many roaming monsters they
move in groups and attack
everyone indiscriminately.
And at night or in rain, monsters that use
poison or magick appear.
<COL ffdc78>Monsters with higher levels are more powerful.</COL>
Fight against enemies that match your level.

In Lestania, beside the Arisen live many.wrapped:
In Lestania, beside the Arisen
live many people (NPCs).
NPCs have different roles, such as:
Shopkeepers and Innkeeps.
Quest clients.
Area and Job Masters.
Be sure to meet them all!

For players who want to play the feature.wrapped:
For players who want to play the featured quests,
<COL ffdc78>Quick Parties</COL> with others and Rift Teleports to
the closest locations are also available.
In addition, quests that are part of
<COL ffdc78>Today's Party Bonus</COL> on the Regional Menu are
designed to give bonus rewards when cleared in a
party with other players, and their
contents change every day.
Be sure to check <COL ffdc78>Lestania News</COL> daily.

<COL ffdc78>Lestania News</COL> is your.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>Lestania News</COL> is your adventure guide to this
world, featuring articles on various topics
currently happening across Lestania.
You can read it talking to Seneka or via the
<COL ffdc78>Quest</COL> option in the [<KC UI_GAME_MENU>] Game Menu.
Check here for the latest information on ongoing
World Quests, Events, and more.

<COL ffdc78>\"Shortcuts\"</COL> are a co.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>"Shortcuts"</COL> are a convenient way to execute game
functions with a simple button combination.
The use of healing items, chat messages, menu/pawn
commands and more in an instant can be the
difference between life and death.
If you have an item or feature you might want to
use in a hurry, make sure to
register it in advance.

The Information that is displayed can be.wrapped:
The Information that is displayed can be filtered
with [<KC UI_LB>/<KC UI_RB>]; this will switch channels.
Use (+) to add a channel.
While in the input field, press [<KC UI_RT>] to
enlarge the chat log.
Use [<KC KEY_UP>/<KC KEY_DOWN>] to scroll through it.

<COL ffdc78>Chat</COL>\r\nThis is the fu.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>Chat</COL>
This is the fundamental tool you use to
communicate with others during gameplay.
The <COL ffdc78>Chat Log</COL> records all messages
recieved during gameplay.
This chat gets refreshed
continously during gameplay.
Press [<KC UI_CHAT>] to enter chat mode.
This will switch to the chat window so you can
input what you want to say.

In <COL ffdc78>World Quests</COL> and <C.wrapped:
In <COL ffdc78>World Quests</COL> and <COL ffdc78>Main Quests</COL>, all party members
should also fulfil the
recommended level requirements.
If your equipment does not match your level, the
quest difficulty goes up.
Be sure to be prepared!

<COL ffdc78>When the Main Quest's object.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>When the Main Quest's objective is to defeat
monsters, the target enemies will be marked on the
minimap with a red circle.</COL>
Also, a history of previous quests is available
from Master Joseph in the
<COL ffdc78>Audience Room.</COL>
If you wish to look back upon your previous
exploits, give him a visit.

A Personal Quest will appear as a <COL f.wrapped:
A Personal Quest will appear as a <COL ffdc78>
Priority Quest</COL> once accepted.
Even if your destination is far away, it will
appear on the minimap in the upper-right
corner of the screen.
This will help you reach your objectives.

<COL ffdc78>World Quests</COL> and their.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>World Quests</COL> and their rewards can be checked at
any time by checking
<COL ffdc78>Lestania News.</COL>
Also, each <COL ffdc78>Area Master has
World Quest information.</COL>
You can get detailed information of what the enemy
is or where it appears.
Also note that <COL ffdc78>Public quests and Hidden Quests</COL>
have different rewards and objectives.

<COL ffdc78>The White Dragon Temple</COL.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>The White Dragon Temple</COL> is a vital location and
the starting point of adventures for all players.
The <COL ffdc78>Audience Chamber</COL> is where you undertake your
duties as the Arisen.
Now, open your map and head to the back of the
<COL ffdc78>Central Plaza</COL>.

<COL ffdc78>The channel your message \r\.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>The channel your message is directed to can be
switched using the channel menu located above
the chat input area.</COL>
Utilise it when you want to change the
recipient of your messages.
You can check the current selection
below the input area.

Extreme Missions are available for appli.wrapped:
Extreme Missions are available for application
from the "Entry Board".
Please talk to the NPC at the counter and
participate in the Extreme Missions.
Skilled Arisen should challenge them fully
equipped and aim for the powerful enemy
that awaits at the end.

As an Arisen, you gain <COL ffdc78>EXP</.wrapped:
As an Arisen, you gain <COL ffdc78>EXP</COL> through battles and
completing quests,which allows you to level up.
Remember the main elements of growth: - Increases
in stats such as Strength and Magick - Increases
in the number of items that can be equipped -
Acquisition of Job Points - Learning new skills
and abilities It is important to note that levels
increase separately for each job.

New skills and abilities can be learned.wrapped:
New skills and abilities can be learned and
equipped by consulting with Archibald at the
temple and the <COL ffdc78>Arts Support</COL> at each Portcrystal,
and paying Job Points.
When you level up, it would be a good idea to go
and see if there are any new
techniques that you can use.

<COL 78f5ff>Dragon Force Augmentation ha.wrapped:
<COL 78f5ff>Dragon Force Augmentation has been unlocked!</COL>
<COL ffdc78>By offering Blood Orbs to the White Dragon,
you can grow stronger.</COL>
Talk to the White Dragon and choose a
category to enhance:
<COL ffdc78>Vitality</COL>…HP, stamina, and basic attributes
<COL ffdc78>Utility</COL>…Item capacity and wealth
<COL ffdc78>Strength</COL>…Physical power
<COL ffdc78>Magick</COL>…Magickal potency

Defeat the Blood Orb Enemies and \r\ncol.wrapped:
Defeat the Blood Orb Enemies and
collect many Blood Orbs.
Furthermore, by offering Blood Orbs to the White
Dragon, like you, your main Pawn can also improve
its various abilities.
Additionally, there are elements that can be
obtained based on the total level of the Jobs
(Total Level), so it is recommended to make
good use of job changes.

During an adventure, if your Health runs.wrapped:
During an adventure, if your Health runs out, you
will collapse on the spot and enter a
<COL ffdc78>[dead state]</COL>.
If there are other players in your party, you will
be considered <COL ffdc78>incapacitated</COL>
and can be revived on the spot within a certain
amount of time with their help.
Likewise, when your fellow allies run out of
Health, you can approach them and press the <KC TOUCH>
button to assist the Arisen or Pawn.

However, when there are no other players.wrapped:
However, when there are no other players present
or when a certain amount of time has passed, you
will have to choose one of the three
revival methods and revive.
Using "Revival Power"... Full health
revival on the spot.
Using a "Golden Gemstone"... Full health revival,
in a "Strengthened" state.
Returning to the base... Becoming a "Weakened"
state and reviving at the previous base.

<COL 78f5ff>Party play with other Arisen.wrapped:
<COL 78f5ff>Party play with other Arisen has been unlocked!</COL>
There are four ways to team up with other: 1.You
can become the party leader and send invitation
requests to other players.
2.You can join other parties as a guest.
3.You can use the Quick Party feature.
4.You can use the Party Recruitment Board.

You can also invite people to your party.wrapped:
You can also invite people to your party in the
following ways: Talk to a player character [<KC TOUCH>] and
invite them from the conversation menu.
Invite from the chat log.
After expanding the chat log with [<KC UI_RT>], go to [<KC KEY_UP>/<KC KEY_DOWN>]
and invite by selecting the speaker's name.

The <COL ffdc78>Main Pawn</COL> will gro.wrapped:
The <COL ffdc78>Main Pawn</COL> will grow by adventuring and gaining
experience, just like you, an Arisen.
By <COL ffdc78>Crafting</COL>, your item creation
abilities will also grow.
They can also learn combat skills and change
vocations, so assign them a role
that suits your goals.

Pawns will act autonomously during the \.wrapped:
Pawns will act autonomously during the
adventure,but when commanded by the Arisen, they
will prioritize carrying out the command.
<COL ffdc78>Additionally, with Pawns, crafting and
enhancing items is possible.</COL>
The Pawns will always be there as reliable
adventure partners, ready to assist you whenever
you need their strength.

<COL 78f5ff>Pawn contracts have been unl.wrapped:
<COL 78f5ff>Pawn contracts have been unlocked!</COL>
<COL ffdc78>Pawns</COL> are your loyal followers, beings from
another world, serving you, the Arisen.
Summon your Main Pawns from the [<KC UI_GAME_MENU>] Game Menu, <COL ffdc78>
Party</COL>, <COL ffdc78>Party Management</COL>,
<COL ffdc78>Main Pawn</COL>.

There are two main types of pawns:\r\nth.wrapped:
There are two main types of pawns: the <COL ffdc78>Main Pawn</COL>
that you sign a contract with, and the <COL ffdc78>support
pawns</COL> that you can hire from other Arisen players.
If you want to welcome a pawn to your party, you
can call them from <COL ffdc78>Riftstone</COL>
or the game menu <COL ffdc78>Party Management</COL>.

<COL ffdc78>If assistance cannot be prov.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>If assistance cannot be provided within a certain
period of time, the Arisen employer can revive the
fallen Pawn by touching them and providing either
their own Revival Power or a Golden Gemstone.</COL>
- Giving one's own Revival Power: Fully restores
health and revives on the spot.
- Giving one's own Golden Gemstone: Fully restores
health and revives on the spot in
a strengthened state.

When a Pawn takes damage and runs out of.wrapped:
When a Pawn takes damage and runs out of health,
they become "incapacitated" and after a certain
amount of time, they will end up in a state of
"death" just like you.
<COL ffdc78>When a Pawn becomes incapacitated, if an Arisen
approaches within a certain amount of time, they
can revive them on the spot using the
<KC TOUCH> command.</COL>

The main factors that increase the atten.wrapped:
The main factors that increase the attention of
enemies are as follows - Attacking or damaging
enemies - Using recovery magick - Being close to
enemies - Clinging to enemies (medium to large
enemies) - Using provocation skills Be aware when
you don't want enemies to target you or when you
want to draw attention to yourself!

<Attacker>: Fighter, Hunter, etc.\r\nThe.wrapped:
<Attacker>: Fighter, Hunter, etc.
The main role is to inflict damage on enemies.
<Healer>: Priest, etc.
The main role is to heal fellow players and
support them according to the battle situation.
<Tank>: Shield Sage, etc.
The main role is to take advantage of high defense
to draw attention and attacks of enemies.

In addition, the experience gained when\.wrapped:
In addition, the experience gained when completing
quests and the clear reward items vary depending
on the level difference between the
party members and you.
The member with the highest level is the standard,
and the greater the difference,
the greater the reward.
Keep this in mind when asking for the
help of a strong Arisen!

You can check the information of party m.wrapped:
You can check the information of party members in
the gauge and mini-map on the screen.
When a party member is defeated, make sure to
immediately help them up, and check if they have
not been separated and so on.
Also, pay attention to the
condition of your allies.

In the outdoors, there are places where.wrapped:
In the outdoors, there are places where
you can try <COL ffdc78>Climbing</COL>.
If you find a ladder, a rock wall covered in
vines, or a giant tree, try climbing it.
However, be careful of the damage from
falling from a high place.
<PADM>During climbing, use the [left stick] to move.<KEYM>
During climbing, use the [<KC MOVE_FORWARD>
<KC MOVE_LEFT><KC MOVE_BACKWARD><KC MOVE_RIGHT>] to move.</KEYM>
<PADM>(Pressing [<KC DASH>] while moving will make you jump
forward) <KEYM>(Pressing the same movement key twice
will make you jump forward)</KEYM>

The points where you can collect items i.wrapped:
The points where you can collect items include
treasure chests, herbs, veins, fallen trees, and
bodies of water. They vary in kind.
<COL ffdc78>Some of them can only be collected with specific
tools like a Pickaxe, so make sure to
always carry one with you.</COL>
You can purchase collection tools at the
<COL ffdc78>Item Shop</COL>, so be sure to keep them
with you at all times.

There are four classifications of items:.wrapped:
There are four classifications of items:
<COL ffdc78>Consumable items, material items, Equipment,
and Job-specific items.</COL>
<COL ffdc78>Consumable items</COL>
These items are consumed upon use
to gain their effects.
<COL ffdc78>Material items</COL>
These items can be used as crafting materials.

Furthermore, there are quests that can b.wrapped:
Furthermore, there are quests that can be
undertaken in each area, as well as a variety of
items available in the shops and different enemies
and levels of difficulty.
By understanding the unique characteristics of
each area, you can progress in your adventure
more advantageously.

The world is divided into different area.wrapped:
The world is divided into different areas: Each
area is named, such as <COL ffdc78>Hidell Plains</COL>,
<COL ffdc78>Breya Coast</COL> and <COL ffdc78>Mysree Forest.</COL>
To find out which area your destination or current
location is in, it's a good idea to develop a
habit of checking the Map in the game menu called
World (Game menu: <KC UI_GAME_MENU>) (Map: <COL ffdc78>World</COL>)

[<KC UI_GAME_MENU>] Game Menu <COL ffdc7.wrapped:
[<KC UI_GAME_MENU>] Game Menu <COL ffdc78>Character</COL>
From <COL ffdc78>Status/Equipment</COL> in the Character menu, you
can switch equipment and check its details.
Equipment can be equipped on different body parts
such as the head, arms and torso.
They greatly affects your strength and health.
You can purchase equipment at shops
like the Equipment Shop.

When you want to change the appearance o.wrapped:
When you want to change the appearance or voice of
your character, visit Morris at the <COL ffdc78>
Beauty Salon</COL> in the Temple.
<COL ffdc78>A Golden Gemstone is required for
changing your appearance</COL>.
In addition to hairstyles and makeup, you can
freely change facial features,
body shape, and more.

The main currency in this world is <COL.wrapped:
The main currency in this world is <COL ffdc78></COL><ICON G><COL ffdc78>: Gold</COL>
If you have gold, you can buy and sell items in
stores at the temples and in villages.
<COL ffdc78>Trading items</COL>
Select <COL ffdc78>Shop</COL> from the store NPC conversation menu.
[<KC UI_START>] Toggle item buy/sell [<KC UI_Y>] Toggle item info [<KC UI_X>]
Toggle equipment try-on

When you rest at the <COL ffdc78>Inn</CO.wrapped:
When you rest at the <COL ffdc78>Inn</COL>, you can
heal your wounded body.
Your health and stamina will be restored to their
maximum values, and any abnormal
conditions will be cured.
The Inn can be used as a base in various locations
in Lestania, so it's reassuring to know its
whereabouts when traveling.

It is recommended to check the Bazaar \r.wrapped:
It is recommended to check the
Bazaar listing frequently.
You may be able to find unexpected
treasures or rare items.
Please note that there are limits on the number,
variety, and price of items that can be
handled in the Bazaar.

Job Masters will raise the level cap of.wrapped:
Job Masters will raise the level cap of combat
skills that correspond to the challenges by
achieving "Job Training".
※ The level cap varies depending
on the combat skill.
Custom Skills, in particular, will be greatly
enhanced in terms of performance and number of
attacks when strengthened to level 6.

<COL 78f5ff>Job Master Training is now\r.wrapped:
<COL 78f5ff>Job Master Training is now available!</COL>
A "Job Master" is an expert of each job who can
teach advanced skills and abilities to those who
have mastered the basics of the job.
If you have reached Level 18, visit Renton in the
Temple District. He will introduce you as a
trainer who will help you with your training.

<COL 78f5ff>Area Master information has.wrapped:
<COL 78f5ff>Area Master information has been unlocked!</COL>
An <COL ffdc78>Area Master</COL> is someone who is well-versed in
the local situation.
There is one person in each area who can provide
information about quests, notable enemies to watch
out for, and adventure spots in that region.

<COL 78f5ff>Clans are now available!</CO.wrapped:
<COL 78f5ff>Clans are now available!</COL>
<COL ffdc78>Clans</COL> are alliances formed by players.
Joining a clan is a great way to expand your
adventures and form bonds with other players.
You can create, search, and join a clan by talking
to Kibiza, the owner of the Clan Tavern in the
Temple's <COL ffdc78>Relay Station District</COL>.

In the center of the temple stands a pil.wrapped:
In the center of the temple stands a pillar known
as the <COL ffdc78>Dragon's Portcrystal</COL>.
This pillar is used for <COL ffdc78>Rift Teleportation</COL>.
The Dragon's Portcrystal is connected to the
riftstones in each section of the temple, and by
using Teleport to Riftstone, it is convenient for
moving within the temple.</COL>

If you want to create a new item, go to.wrapped:
If you want to create a new item, go to the
<COL ffdc78>Craft Item</COL> section in the crafting menu and select
the item you want to make.
The things you need are: - A main pawn that will
do the work - Material items - Crafting costs -
Crafting time By using using special trait stones
during weapon production, you can
also enhance it's power.

<COL ffdc78>Enhance Equipment</COL>\r\nC.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>Enhance Equipment</COL>
Combine material items with equipment to increase
its Grade (★) through forging.
Significantly boosts base performance.
<COL ffdc78>Mount Crest</COL>
Attach special material items, <COL ffdc78>Crests,</COL>
to grant various abilities like improved stats,
attributes, or bonus effects.
Equipped Crests can be removed by destroying them.

In the Workshop, besides <COL ffdc78>Cra.wrapped:
In the Workshop, besides <COL ffdc78>Craft Item</COL>, you can
customize equipment through <COL ffdc78>Enhance Equipment,
Mount Crest, and Change Color.</COL>
By gathering required items and paying fees, you
can improve basic performance or modify appearance
- perfect your favorite equipment
through these upgrades.

The Fighter is a highly skilled close-qu.wrapped:
The Fighter is a highly skilled close-quarters
combatant specialized in ground-based attacks.
Equipped with a sword and shield, they can also
use the shield to defend themselves.
[Basic Controls] - Press [<KC ATTACK1>] for a combo
attack with the sword.
- Hold [<KC ATTACK2>] for a charged slashing attack.
- Press [<KC WEAPON_SUB>] to guard.

The Hunter excels at shooting with a bow.wrapped:
The Hunter excels at shooting with a bow, being a
master of long-range attacks. They particularly
demonstrate their skills by aiming for weak points
when facing airborne or large enemies.
[Basic Operations] - Hold <KC HOLD_BOW> to ready the bow.
- While aiming, press <KC SHOOT> to release an arrow.
- Press <KC RELOAD> to reload arrows.
- Press <KC ATTACK1> to perform a front kick.

Priests are experts in supporting their.wrapped:
Priests are experts in supporting their alliesand
excel in support such as recovery, ability
increases and detecting enemy weaknesses.
[Basic Operations] [<KC ATTACK1>] Heal Aura (Creates a
recovery field around oneself) [<KC ATTACK2>] Blast Bit
(Attack with magick spheres) [<KC SKILL_NORMAL1>] Holy Aura
(Creates an offensive holy strike
field around oneself)

Shield Sages are frontline fortresses, c.wrapped:
Shield Sages are frontline fortresses, converting
blocked damage into power, along with
commanding elemental magicks.
<KC WEAPON_SUB> Shield Lock (Guard)
<KC ATTACK1> Shield Blow (Shield Combo)
<KC WEAPON_MAIN> Attract (Draws enemy ire) ※Auto-guards when
shield out (except during skills)

The Seeker is a skilled performer in the.wrapped:
The Seeker is a skilled performer in the art of
acrobatics, using a combination of dagger strikes
and aerial attacks such as the Seeker Rope.
[Basic Operations] - Press <KC ATTACK1> for a rapid
onslaught of dagger attacks.
- Use <KC ATTACK2> for the Scarlet Kisses technique, a
high-speed dagger attack.
- Employ <KC ROLLING> to perform a forward roll
for evasive maneuvers.

The Element Archer uses a magickal bow a.wrapped:
The Element Archer uses a magickal bow and magick
arrows to perform both attacks
and support for allies.
They are a mystic sniper who can target
multiple opponents at once.
[Basic Operations]
<PADM> Press [<KC WEAPON_SUB>] for Seeker Stance
(Attack Arrow Stance).
<KEYM>Hold [<KC HOLD_BOW>] for Seeker Stance (Attack Arrow Stance)</KEYM>
<PADM>Hold [<KC WEAPON_SUB>] + move right stick
<KEYM>Hold [<KC HOLD_BOW>] + <ICON MOUSE>move using the mouse</KEYM>
Magick Eye: Seeker (Locks onto multiple enemies)
While in stance, press [<KC SHOOT>] to shoot Seeker Arrow.
Press [<KC ATTACK1>] for a Front Kick.

The Warrior is a fighter who crushes ene.wrapped:
The Warrior is a fighter who crushes enemies with
their steel body and heavy two-handed weapon. The
more they withstand enemy attacks, the more their
destructive power increases.
[Basic Operations] - [KC ATTACK1]: Hack (Multiple
slashes) - [KC ATTACK2]: Savage Lash (Hold down
to charge the slash)

Sorcerers are skilled magicians with ver.wrapped:
Sorcerers are skilled magicians with versatile and
powerful attack magick. They excel in firepower
and wide-range combat by exploiting the weaknesses
in their enemies' attributes.
[Basic Operations] [Magick Bolts] <KC ATTACK1>
[Magick Trap] <KC ATTACK2>

You can use the shield as a starting poi.wrapped:
You can use the shield as a starting point for
counterattacks, and also to launch your
allies to higher places.
Because it has low magick resistance, support from
allies is necessary to defend against
enemy attribute attacks.
Understand your strengths and weaknesses and
actively dive into enemy territory to deal damage.

A Fighter can navigate through any comba.wrapped:
A Fighter can navigate through any combat
situation with versatility, but they excel in
close-range physical attacks.
The basic principle is to approach the enemy,
deflecting their attacks with a shield, and
then strike accurately.

The role of a Priest is primarily focuse.wrapped:
The role of a Priest is primarily focused on
healing and supporting the team.
The ability to efficiently heal oneself and allies
is crucial for achieving victory.
Additionally, utilizing Heal Aura to detect the
weak points of large enemies and triggering their
"Secret Core Manifestation" is a vital
responsibility of a Priest.
It is important to provide the most appropriate
support that aligns with the current battle
situation in order to effectively support
and uplift everyone.

For a Priest, approaching the enemy is n.wrapped:
For a Priest, approaching the enemy is
not very beneficial.
Their combat style is to always maintain a safe
position at medium to long range, and perform ally
recovery and support through magick, as well
as auxiliary attacks.

When you learn a skill, you can shoot ar.wrapped:
When you learn a skill, you can shoot arrows
with various effects.
Additionally, there is a wide range of strategies
available, such as adding abnormal states with
job-specific items and special arrows.
Always keep a lookout on the entire enemy group
and determine which individuals or body
parts to prioritize.

The Hunter's bow is known for its abilit.wrapped:
The Hunter's bow is known for its ability to
accurately target specific parts of the enemy
even from a distance.
The power of the bow is also influenced by the
distance between the Hunter and the enemy, so it
is important to avoid unnecessary closeness and
maintain the optimal distance for shooting.

The damage received with a Greatshield c.wrapped:
The damage received with a Greatshield can be
converted into attack power and stored
in the "Force Gauge".
By transforming the force into a magick attribute,
you can enchant allies or perform magick attacks
that exploit the enemy's weaknesses.
For a Shield Sage, defense is their offense.

For a Shield Sage, the Greatshield is no.wrapped:
For a Shield Sage, the Greatshield is not for
protecting themselves, but for protecting their
comrades and gaining opportunities
for allies to attack.
When facing multiple enemies or when comrades are
targeted by the enemy, take the initiative to step
forward and use the Attract skill to steal
the enemy's attention.
When using the Attract skill, the stronger the
enemy's focus, the more prominently the "Attention
Icon" will be displayed.

Compensate for the low attack power of i.wrapped:
Compensate for the low attack power of individual
techniques with a barrage of strikes, and always
seize the initiative by exploiting the
enemy's blind spots.
By making skillful use of evasion techniques and
ropes, you can gracefully cut through your enemies
like the wind, effortlessly maneuvering through
the battlefield unscathed.

Depending on the type of magick arrows,.wrapped:
Depending on the type of magick arrows, you can
simultaneously target multiple enemies or allies,
or maintain an optimal distance with the target to
shorten the concentration time.
It is important to choose magick arrows that suit
the situation and the state of the enemies and
allies, and shoot accurately.

The biggest feature of the Element Arche.wrapped:
The biggest feature of the Element Archer is that
the arrows released from the Magick Bow can change
into both magickal blades and healing light
depending on how the bow is held.
In addition, by taking aim with the Magick Bow and
focusing on the target, it is possible to increase
concentration, which is also a key point.
The longer the concentration time, the higher the
power of the magick arrows. Furthermore, by
releasing the magick arrow at the moment the
concentration time is complete, its power
increases even more.

The Warrior, by enduring enemy attacks,\.wrapped:
The Warrior, by enduring enemy attacks,
accumulates a "Revenge Gauge" which increases the
power of Savage Lash in proportion to its amount.
They can retaliate with a force greater than what
they have endured, channeling their determination
and power into striking back at the enemy
together with Savage Lash.
The unwavering fighting spirit to withstand and
unleash explosive power alongside their sword is
the Warrior's tactic.

The greatest characteristic of a Warrior.wrapped:
The greatest characteristic of a Warrior is their
overwhelming Physical Attack Power with
thick two-handed weapons.
Although they lack mobility, their refined strikes
boast incredible destructive power, intimidating
and sending enemies flying, dealing fatal damage.

The Sorcerer's greatest spectacle is unl.wrapped:
The Sorcerer's greatest spectacle is unleashing a
devastating magick attack that strikes the
enemy's weak attribute.
While they excel in firepower, they are also
vulnerable during the incantation of powerful
magick, making them easy targets for the enemy.
Be wary of your position and timing
when engaging in combat.

<COL ffdc78>[Auto-Run]</COL> is a suppor.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>[Auto-Run]</COL> is a support function that makes
long-distance travel easier.
When going on adventures to faraway places, be
sure to give it a try.
[<KC AUTO_RUN>] Auto-Run (continuous running) ※Press
again to deactivate.

<COL ffdc78>\"Achievement\"</COL> is a p.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>"Achievement"</COL> is a proof of achievement that is
awarded to you for various actions
you take in the game.
It includes defeating enemies, completing quests,
crafting, and more, so please try to find them.
The achievements you have earned can be checked in
the <KC UI_GAME_MENU>Game Menu under
"Character" -> "Achievements".

To use the <COL ffdc78>Party Recruitment.wrapped:
To use the <COL ffdc78>Party Recruitment Board</COL>, go to Game
Menu <COL ffdc78>Recruitment Board</COL> and select <COL ffdc78>
Party Recruitment Board</COL>.
You can use the Entry Board function to recruit
parties by category and search for players who are
currently recruiting!

[Blood Orb] can be exchanged for valuabl.wrapped:
[Blood Orb] can be exchanged for valuable items,
such as the Crest and rare materials, by
individuals such as Alvar from the Pawn Cathedral,
aside from the White Dragon.
If you have the opportunity, you should pay them a
visit and engage in a trade.

<COL 78f5ff>The Workshop is now availabl.wrapped:
<COL 78f5ff>The Workshop is now available!</COL>
The <COL ffdc78>Workshop</COL> is a place where you can process
material items and produce/customize various
items and equipment.
The contracted pawns will
perform crafting work here.

If you can defeat the specified enemies.wrapped:
If you can defeat the specified enemies within the
time limit, you will clear the mission and receive
a special reward that cannot be found elsewhere.
However, if time runs out, the mission will be
considered a failure and no
rewards will be obtained.

If the [Revival Power] and [Golden Gemst.wrapped:
If the [Revival Power] and [Golden Gemstone] are
depleted, you will not be able
to revive on the spot.
You can revive by choosing "Return to Base", but
due to the <COL ffdc78>debuff of Weakened</COL>, your basic
abilities will be lower than usual for a
certain period of time.
Always keep an eye on the remaining amount of
[Revival Power] and [Golden Gemstone].

Who is the party leader?\r\nMake sure to.wrapped:
Who is the party leader?
Make sure to confirm during adventures.
<COL ffdc78>If the leader is absent, the
adventure cannot proceed.</COL>
Return to the White Dragon Temple or a Rift Stone,
and select a new leader from the Party Management.

<COL ffdc78>To hire a support pawn, you.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>To hire a support pawn, you need
to pay Rift Crystals. </COL>
However you can search for pawns that meet your
needs based on their level, job, crafting skills,
and other conditions.
<COL ffdc78>Additionally, taking a support pawn on adventures
outside for a certain period of time will reduce
their 'Adventure Count,' and using them to craft
once will decrease their 'Craft Count.' </COL> When the
remaining counts reach zero, return
and hire them again.

<COL ffdc78>Also, if your main pawn is l.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>Also, if your main pawn is lost or not in the
party while crafting, you cannot include a support
pawn in the party, so please be careful.</COL>
It is also a good idea to search for friend's
pawns or pawns encountered during your journey.
Note that you cannot see the appearance of pawns
belonging to other people's parties.

<COL ffdc78>During party play, the prior.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>During party play, the priority quest set by the
leader becomes the priority quest for all members,
and the objective display on the
screen also switches.</COL>
Also, the overall situation of Lestania, including
the area rank and progress of the main quest, is
aligned with the leader's progress.
Remember these two points.

[Basic During Party Play]\r\nWhen enemie.wrapped:
[Basic During Party Play] When enemies target tank
jobs, the tank icon <COL ffdc78>[tank icon]</COL> will be displayed
on their health gauge.
Attackers and healers can confirm this icon and
safely engage the enemies targeting the tank,
attacking or providing healing and support.
Tanks can use skills like provoke to
attract enemies' attention.

<COL ffdc78>Equipment</COL>\r\nBy equipp.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>Equipment</COL>
By equipping, attack power, defense power,
stamina, and so on will increase.
<COL ffdc78>Job-specific items</COL>
For example, the Hunter's special arrows.
They are used in combat.
There are limits to the number of slots and
quantity that can be carried for each.
Therefore, before embarking on an adventure, make
sure to check your belongings.

You are limited in the items you can equ.wrapped:
You are limited in the items you can equip based
on your job, level, and gender.
<COL ffdc78>It is important to equip weapons and armor that
match your job and level.</COL>
Make sure to carefully check the parameters of
each item and go on an adventure
with the best equipment.

You can also change the voice, the frequ.wrapped:
You can also change the voice, the frequency of
Pawn's comments, and their tone here.
You are free to change it as
many times as you like.
This is the place to go if you want to change the
appearance, voice, or other aspects
of yourself or Pawn!

In addition, there are two types of curr.wrapped:
In addition, there are two types of currency that
are important for Arisen.
<ICON RIM>: Rift Crystals Used for Rift Teleports and
hiring Pawns from other dimensions.
<ICON BO>: Blood Orbs Can be used for Dragon Force
Augmentation from the White Dragon and
traded for valuable items.

In addition, there are special currencie.wrapped:
In addition, there are special currencies that can
be used for special transactions.
<COL ffdc78>Golden Gemstones</COL>
Can be used for various benefits such as special
revivals, Passport Courses, Treasure Lots and
at the beauty salon.
<COL ffdc78>Silver Tickets</COL>
Can be used for Treasure's Lot and other purposes.

Among clan members, there is a lending \.wrapped:
Among clan members, there is a lending and
borrowing system for Pawns, and the Rift
Crystal price decreases.
The range of communication also expands through
clan chat and mail, etc.
Let's recruit companions and join a clan to deepen
the bond between Arisen.

All the Arisen can return to the Dragon'.wrapped:
All the Arisen can return to the Dragon's
Portcrystal from anywhere in their adventurous
journey using the <COL ffdc78>Rift Teleport</COL> in the [<KC UI_GAME_MENU>]
Game Menu of the World.
Furthermore, in various locations in Lestania,
there exist Portcrystals, which allow instant
movement to previously visited places by
paying Rift Crystals.

<COL ffdc78>Pawns gain experience by com.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>Pawns gain experience by completing crafts and
increase their Craft Level.</COL>
Using Craft Points earned through leveling up, you
can increase their production capabilities.
From the Craft Menu's <COL ffdc78>Pawn Status</COL>, select which
abilities you want to enhance.

<COL ffdc78>Change Color</COL>\r\nUse sp.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>Change Color</COL>
Use special material items, <COL ffdc78>Dyes,</COL> to recolor
equipment (Grade ★1 or higher).
Can only change to colors matching the
currently available dyes.
<COL ffdc78>※Supported equipment may vary.</COL>
<COL ffdc78>※Some equipment may not support certain colors.</COL>

Furthermore, the light blue and blue par.wrapped:
Furthermore, the light blue and blue parts of the
arrow loading gauge indicate the timing
for a "Just Timing".
By pressing the [R] button at that timing, the
"Adept Reload" will activate, reducing the
cooldown time and increasing the power.
Blue (Great!!) Cooldown reduction, the first arrow
splits into 3 Light Blue
(Good!) Cooldown reduction

And thus, what is important for a Sorcer.wrapped:
And thus, what is important for a Sorcerer is to
enhance the power of magick, known as "Chanting".
The more Chanting commands uttered during
incantation, the greater the power of the
unleashed magick will be.
Let us refine our Chanting and become
exceptional sorcerers.

Also, during party play, it is possible.wrapped:
Also, during party play, it is possible to set
auto-run to follow other party members.
To enable auto-run to follow the desired member,
approach them and select "Follow Auto-Run" from
the menu using the <KC TOUCH>.
Note: Pawns cannot use follow auto-run.

A <COL ffdc78>Main Pawn</COL> will alway.wrapped:
A <COL ffdc78>Main Pawn</COL> will always respond when called in an
area with temples or riftstones.
However, if you have already commanded them to
craft or if they die during combat and enter a <COL ffdc78>
Lost State</COL>, you cannot summon
them as party members.
Pay attention to the state of your Main Pawn.

If the main pawn cannot be revived and d.wrapped:
If the main pawn cannot be revived and disappears
while in a dead state, it will become<COL ffdc78>
"Lost"</COL>and cannot be recalled.
<COL ffdc78>Lost pawns will be trapped again in the
"Rift" in "Pawn Cathedral"</COL>
Visit "The Rift" and rescue them, and they will be
able to be recalled again!

The support pawn, unable to be revived,.wrapped:
The support pawn, unable to be revived, remains
fallen and disappears. In such cases, the <COL ffdc78>
"Battle Count"</COL> will decrease by one, and the pawn
will be returned to a standby state.
If there are remaining Battle Count, it
can be summoned again.
When a pawn becomes unable to act, it results in a
significant decrease in fighting strength.
Therefore, be sure to quickly help and revive
the incapacitated pawn.

One thing to remember is that the abilit.wrapped:
One thing to remember is that the abilities
obtained through the inheritance of Dragon Force
will be applied to all jobs.
However, <COL ffdc78>Secret Augments</COL> do not take effect
just by acquiring them.
Like regular augments, they need to be set using <COL ffdc78>
Arts Support</COL> in order to activate their effects.

<COL ffdc78>If you wish to create a part.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>If you wish to create a party as the leader:</COL>
Go to the <COL ffdc78>Adventure Organizer</COL> at the base, or
access the <COL ffdc78>Party Management</COL> in the Game Menu.
Send a <COL ffdc78>Party Request</COL> to the players you want to
join through <COL ffdc78>Player Search</COL>.
You can also search for players based on job,
level, and other specific settings.

<COL ffdc78>If you want to join someone'.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>If you want to join someone's party</COL>, you need to
ask another player to send a
<COL ffdc78>party request</COL>.
When you receive a party request, an announcement
will appear in the center of the screen.
Follow the instructions and join the party!

The chat targets are as follows:\r\n<COL.wrapped:
The chat targets are as follows:
<COL ffdc78>Say</COL>: Surrounding players.
<COL ffdc78>Shout</COL>: All players in the world.
<COL ffdc78>Party</COL>: Party members.
<COL ffdc78>Tell</COL>: Specific player.
<COL ffdc78>Clan</COL>: Clan members.
<COL ffdc78>Group</COL> Group Chat members.
<COL ffdc78>Entry Board</COL>: Entry Board participants.

You can obtain skills and abilities by s.wrapped:
You can obtain skills and abilities by selecting
the green icon labeled <COL ffdc78>[GET]</COL>, as shown.
Choose the skill you want to acquire and pay the
Job Points shown below.
<COL ffdc78>Once you have acquired a skill, you can allocate
it to the "Custom Skill Set" frame on the right
side, by selecting the skill icon and using the
corresponding button. This will allow you to use
the skill in combat.</COL>

The acquired <COL ffdc78>augments</COL>.wrapped:
The acquired <COL ffdc78>augments</COL> each have a specific <COL ffdc78>
Ability Cost</COL> required.
As long as it is within the cost limit, you can
freely attach augments regardless of the job.
The way you battle can greatly vary depending on
your skills and augments, so be
sure to give them a try.

Furthermore, by selecting <COL ffdc78>[L.wrapped:
Furthermore, by selecting <COL ffdc78>[LV UP]</COL>
and paying job points, it is possible to further
strengthen the skills and abilities
that have been acquired.
Depending on the skill, there may be an increase
in power, a decrease in cost,
or a change in motion.
For abilities as well, the effects will improve,
be sure to level up your combat techniques.

If you are forming a party with other pl.wrapped:
If you are forming a party with other players and
their pawns, the rules for summoning/returning
pawns are different from when playing solo.
<COL ffdc78> ●Only the leader can summon a new pawn after
party formation (only when the party has
three or fewer members)</COL>
<COL ffdc78> ●Only the owner of the pawn can dismiss it.</COL>

When using <COL ffdc78>Quick Party</COL>.wrapped:
When using <COL ffdc78>Quick Party</COL>.
By using the game menu and <COL ffdc78>Quick Party</COL>, you can
easily form a party with players who
have the same objective.
Specify the quest or area you want
to play and just wait.
The matching process will be done automatically,
so please make use of it.

Furthermore, by returning support pawns,.wrapped:
Furthermore, by returning support pawns, you can
acquire <COL ffdc78>Rental Points</COL>.
Rental Points can be allocated and returned to the
main pawn as Job Points.
By hiring more support pawns, let's encourage the
growth of the main pawn.

Furthermore, while specific <OPCS> is ac.wrapped:
Furthermore, while specific <OPCS> is
active, it will be possible to directly rescue a
lost Main Pawn from the Riftstone.
By selecting "<COL ffdc78>Lost Pawns</COL>" from the Riftstone menu,
you can immediately revive the target Pawn in
exchange for Rift Crystals
corresponding to their level.

Furthermore, at the start of the mission.wrapped:
Furthermore, at the start of the mission, a
"Mission-exclusive item" may be provided.
If a "Mission-exclusive item" is provided, only
that item can be used during the mission.
*Any consumable items held prior to this will be
returned to the Item Bag at
the end of the mission.

Gender and name changes are possible wit.wrapped:
Gender and name changes are possible within the
same facility, using <COL ffdc78>[Reincarnation]</COL>.
To make the changes, you will need a "Golden
Gemstone". You can not only change your gender but
also your appearance and voice, all at the same
time, allowing you to be reborn as the
person you want to become.
※ Please note that you cannot change
the name of the Arisen.

However, in World Quests, you may get in.wrapped:
However, in World Quests, you may get involved in
sudden enemy subjugation quests and
automatically receive them.
<COL ffdc78>Due to limitations, if you are unable to accept
those quests, you can store up to 5 in the "Quest
Orders" function of the Quest Log.
</COL>
When you want to prioritize clearing "Quest
Orders" quests, organize the number of quests in
the Quest Log and accept them formally.

Quests have a limit on the number that c.wrapped:
Quests have a limit on the number that can
be accepted at once.
You can only accept up to 10 quests
simultaneously, so please be aware of that.
If you have accepted quests up to the maximum
limit, you can <COL ffdc78>Cancel Quest</COL> by going to the <KC UI_GAME_MENU>
Game Menu <COL ffdc78>[Quest Log]</COL>
to make room for new quests.

<COL ffdc78>[Battle for Fort Gritten]</C.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>[Battle for Fort Gritten]</COL> is an Extreme Mission
where you form a party of up to eight people to
defend Fort Gritten against formidable enemies.
The battlefield conditions can change at any time,
and you can't afford to let your guard down.
Utilize the roles of each job and work together as
a party to cover each other's
blind spots and fight.

In addition to basic attacks, players ca.wrapped:
In addition to basic attacks, players can use
<COL ffdc78>Custom Skills</COL> by consuming Stamina.
<PADM> Press <KC WEAPON_SUB> and <KC ATTACK1>/<KC ATTACK2> together.
Press <KC WEAPON_MAIN> and <KC ATTACK1>/<KC ATTACK2> together.
<KEYM> Press <KC SKILL_CUSTOM3> <KC SKILL_CUSTOM4>
Press <KC SKILL_CUSTOM1> <KC SKILL_CUSTOM2>
</KEYM>
Check the guide in the bottom right of the screen
to see what kind of techniques can be used.

At night or inside caves, visibility bec.wrapped:
At night or inside caves, visibility
becomes poor and dark.
<COL ffdc78>Use a lantern</COL> in the darkness.
[<KC UI_GAME_MENU>] In the game menu, go to <COL ffdc78>Item Bag</COL> and use the
consumable item <COL ffdc78>Lantern Kindling</COL>
to illuminate the player's surroundings for a
certain period of time.
Always carry several <COL ffdc78>Lantern Kindling</COL>
with you.

Defeat the monsters called <COL ffdc78>B.wrapped:
Defeat the monsters called <COL ffdc78>Blood Orb Enemies</COL>, and
you will obtain a number of
<COL ffdc78>Blood Orbs</COL> corresponding to the
strength of the enemy.
Unlike regular enemies, the <COL ffdc78>Blood Orb Enemies</COL>
have a purple HP gauge.
They are slightly stronger and more challenging
than the surrounding enemies, but let's bravely
face them when we come across them.

If you want to interrupt the game,\r\npl.wrapped:
If you want to interrupt the game, please go to [<KC UI_GAME_MENU>
] Game Menu, <COL ffdc78>Options</COL>
and select <COL ffdc78>Exit Game</COL>.
When you log out, the game will automatically save
your previous play record.
When you restart the game, you will start from the
White Dragon Temple <COL ffdc78>Central Plaza</COL>, not
from your last location.

Depending on the vocation,\r\nthe availa.wrapped:
Depending on the vocation, the available
custom skills may vary.
Try them out in combat.
Please note that any custom skills used during the
introductory quest <COL ffdc78>Resolutions and Omens</COL>
will need to be unlocked.

[Hold Down]\r\nBy performing this action.wrapped:
[Hold Down] By performing this action when a small
enemy staggers or is knocked down, you can
restrain them for a long period of time. The
damage dealt to restrained enemies is
significantly increased.
Perform [<KC TOUCH>] on small enemies while they are
staggered/down (Release with [<KC JUMP>] ) ※ Stamina is
consumed while restraining the enemy

In the <COL ffdc78>Job Training Log</COL.wrapped:
In the <COL ffdc78>Job Training Log</COL>, your progress in the
training you have received from the Job
Masters is recorded.
Here, you can check the current tasks you are
working on and the level of
achievement for each job.
You can also report completed job trainings by
checking the Job Training Log.

<COL ffdc78>The Portcrystal</COL> is a c.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>The Portcrystal</COL> is a convenient transporter used
for Rift Teleport, similar to the
Dragon's Portcrystal.
They are scattered throughout Lestania and by
consuming Rift Crystals, you can instantly travel
to distant Portcrystals.

Traveling is always dangerous, with enem.wrapped:
Traveling is always dangerous, with enemy attacks,

that can be enhanced:

<COL ffdc78>Crafting Speed</COL>
Increases the efficiency of enhancing equipment,

Refining materials used in the production of

Check the requesting party member on the party
screen, and if there are no issues,

period of time, the request will be canceled.

Additionally, the power of the shot vari.wrapped:

depending on the distance from the enemy.
<COL ffdc78>When the enemy is captured with the sniper sight

<COL ffdc78>If you choose to "Revive at Last Camp" during a

Content" </COL> in the game menu.
<COL ffdc78>The proposal will be sent to the party members
participating in the quest. When a proposal is
received from a member, you will be notified
through "World Announcement".</COL>

<COL ffdc78>However, your Area Rank can.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>However, your Area Rank can only be increased when
you are the party leader. </COL>
In some cases, clearing Area Trial
may be a requirement.
Please note that if you are joining another
player's party as a guest, the leader's Area
Rank will be reflected.

<COL 78f5ff>The Lestanian Prologue: "The God's

By the chosen Arisen's hand, The White Dragon
wakes, And the course of history bends anew.
Human, Elf, and Orc— Their fates and futures on
the line, the second verse nears
its hushed unveiling.

If you reach the Betland Plains, you wil.wrapped:
If you reach the Betland Plains, you will be able

As an Arisen, there are further formidable enemies

<COL 78f5ff>Lestania Part 2: \"The Cours.wrapped:
<COL 78f5ff>Lestania Part 2: "The Course of Life" Reached!</COL>
"The life of a friend turned into a precious
sparkle and returned to the presence of the
mighty White Dragon.
Meanwhile, another friend, captured by darkness,
left the temple— Although the leader of the Orcs

The enemies that will appear before you in the

Strengthen your armor and hone your fighting
skills, Prepare for the next battle.
In the shopping district of the White Dragon
Temple, the "Appraisal Exchange" merchant

<COL ffdc78>\"Appraisal Exchange\"</COL>.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>"Appraisal Exchange"</COL> specific Items can be

<COL 78f5ff>Lestania, Part 3: \"Be Forev.wrapped:
<COL 78f5ff>Lestania, Part 3: "Be Forevermore,
White Dragon" Reached!</COL>
"The master of the resurrected calamity, who had
been awakened 300 years ago, was defeated by a
single Arisen, and the mighty White Dragon was

Another calamity, the Golden Dragon, dances in a

Thanks to your efforts as an Arisen, the.wrapped:
Thanks to your efforts as an Arisen, the ambition
of the ancient alchemist
Diamantes has been crushed.

I obtained <COL ffdc78>Arisen's Room</CO.wrapped:
I obtained <COL ffdc78>Arisen's Room</COL>!
In <COL ffdc78>Arisen's Room,</COL> you can set your main pawn as

<COL ffdc78>≪Appraising Jewelry≫</COL>\r.wrapped:

<COL 78f5ff>[Skill Augmentation] has bee.wrapped:

When each job reaches level 40 or above, you can

Enemies that give <COL ffdc78>Corruption.wrapped:

When you are exposed to the <COL ffdc78>
Corruption Spores</COL> released by Corruption monsters,

Lance, you can accumulate
<COL ffdc78>Spirit Gauge</COL>.

[<KC ELIXIR_CHANGE>] Attack Boost [<KC SKILL_NORMAL1>] Heal Boost

Furthermore, when the Corruption-infecte.wrapped:

that has not released its Corruption spores comes

In addition, by drawing the attention of.wrapped:
In addition, by drawing the attention of the
Corruption Infected to Tanks, it is possible to

on clinging players.
Let us make use of the unique characteristics of

<COL ffdc78>The Demon of Darkness Awaken.wrapped:

<COL ffdc78>[Bloodbane Isle's Feast of M.wrapped:

At the start of the mission, party members are
divided into two groups.
Let's reunite quickly and turn the tide of battle.

<COL 78f5ff>The Infection Introduction:"The Fate

"Even amidst the turmoil brought by the storm, The
Knights and the Arisen did not falter, For the

Yet the corrupted calamity remains unvanquished,
The key to the truth lies Within the solitary
island floating in the vast ocean—"

<COL 78f5ff>The Infection Part 2: \"The.wrapped:
<COL 78f5ff>The Infection Part 2: "The

By replacing the equipment for each part of your

The Arisen Corps led by you has successf.wrapped:
The Arisen Corps led by you has successfully

In order to investigate the source of the calamity

Cecily's homeland, the Phindym continent.
Let us train our equipment and prepare for a new
battle in a land with different cultures.

When a Corruption Core is present, it becomes
difficult to inflict damage with regular attacks.

By destroying all Corruption Cores, you can bring
the enemy down and create an
opportunity for safe attacks.

Abnormal corruption states can be prevented by

You can install or change the furniture you

Set up your favorite furniture

Skilled Arisen, please challenge this new mission.

The Sub Portcrystals are like receiving-only
devices. They can only be
selected as a destination.

instantly teleport to previously
hard to reach places.

<COL ffdc78>At the start of the mission,.wrapped:

come up with a strategy.

Power are more effective.

temporarily increases the decrease in the
enemy's Stamina Gauge.

the time until the enemy is down.

Also, the condition for the stamina gauge to turn
blue varies for each enemy.
For example, when attacking an enraged enemy and
disrupting their posture, or when winged beasts
are flying in the sky.

When the enemy's stamina gauge turns blue,
actively cling to them and aim to shake them up.

The gathering Dragon Force is incredibly.wrapped:
The gathering Dragon Force is incredibly powerful,
incomparable to before.
Countless Myrmidons are being produced and they
will stand in your way.
Let's strategize so that you don't end up
isolated among the enemies.

A new species of the corrupted,<COL ffdc.wrapped:
A new species of the corrupted,<COL ffdc78>
'Severely Infected'</COL>, which becomes an advanced
type of the Corruption Monster, has appeared.

of damage inflicted </COL> .

One of the strengths of the Spirit Lancer is the
ability to evade enemy attacks
through evasion maneuvers.

is also possible to accumulate more Spirit Gauge.
[<KC AVOID>] Scáth Move (Evasion Movement) During Boost

Aid is also one of the important roles in

About <COL ffdc78>[Interrogation]</COL>\.wrapped:
About <COL ffdc78>[Interrogation]</COL>
Interrogation is a mission to approach critical
information by conversing with individuals who
hold crucial information, along with Mephis.
Interrogation requires <COL ffdc78>[evidence]</COL>, which can be
obtained through <COL ffdc78>[Intelligence Assessment]</COL>.
<COL ffdc78>The outcome of the interrogation can also result
in changes to the content of
[Intelligence Assessment]</COL>.

About <COL ffdc78>\"Undercover\" </COL>\.wrapped:
About <COL ffdc78>"Undercover" </COL>
Undercover investigation refers to a mission where
tasks assigned by Marquis <NPC 681> are carried out
while collecting information on Marquis <NPC 681>'s
actions and information that can be
used for interrogation.
<COL ffdc78>The results of the undercover investigation may
also bring changes to the content of
"Intelligence Assessment".</COL>

<COL ffdc78>\"Resurrection of the Flame.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>"Resurrection of the Flame of Despair"</COL>
is a War Mission where you can form a party of up
to 8 people and fight against the evil dragon that
has reappeared in Firefall Mountain.
Let's corner the evil dragon that keeps reviving
and aim for its complete defeat.

Depending on the results of area conques.wrapped:
Depending on the results of area conquest and raid
events, the Arisen's status may change.
The changed status can be confirmed through
announcements and chat logs, and the effects will
disappear as soon as the mission ends.
Let's progress through the missions while aiming
for better performance.

<COL ffdc78>Also, during a single intell.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>Also, during a single intelligence operation, it
is not possible to obtain all the evidence</COL>
If there are no more places to search, it is a
good idea to return and proceed
with other missions.
<COL ffdc78>While progressing through "interrogations" and
"undercover investigations", repeat quests
multiple times to gather "evidence"</COL>

Regarding [Evidence]:\r\nInterrogations.wrapped:
Regarding [Evidence]: Interrogations progress by
presenting the dedicated item, [Evidence], and
cornering the interrogatee.
[Evidence] can be obtained within [Intelligence
Assessment] and the obtained evidence can be
confirmed from the Substory Log.

After clearing The Trial of the Stone Mo.wrapped:
After clearing The Trial of the Stone Monument,
you can obtain the "Divine Protection of Heroic
Spirits" and temporarily enhance the abilities of
your player character.
The enhancements include various stat boosts and
resistance increases, and you can freely choose
one from the options presented.
※This enhancement is only valid within the Epitaph
Road and will reset upon moving
to a different area.

About <COL ffdc78>\"Intelligence Assessm.wrapped:
About <COL ffdc78>"Intelligence Assessment"</COL>
Intelligence Assessment Investigate the Megado at
night with Mephis freely to collect <COL ffdc78>
Evidence </COL> for interrogation.
<COL ffdc78>In this mission only, You can end it at any time
by talking to Mephis</COL>

[Event: About Eavesdropping]\r\nIn the a.wrapped:
[Event: About Eavesdropping] In the alleys of
Megado at night, residents sometimes engage in
whispered conversations.
If you approach them, you can eavesdrop on their
secret talks, but be careful not to get too close
and arouse suspicion.
<COL ffdc78>Let's try to stealthily eavesdrop on the
information by hiding effectively.</COL>
Also, when eavesdropping, pay attention to the
<COL ffdc78>chat logs</COL>.

About the Interrogation Gauge\r\nThe Int.wrapped:
About the Interrogation Gauge The Interrogation
Gauge decreases in response to the following
actions: Selecting the wrong evidence Choosing the
wrong answer to a question Selecting "Threaten"
<COL ffdc78>If the Interrogation Gauge reaches zero, that
day's interrogation will end,
so please be careful.</COL>

Regarding Mephis's mutterings:\r\nIn int.wrapped:
Regarding Mephis's mutterings: In intelligence
assessments, you are free to proceed with the
investigation of Megado.
If there are any developments, Mephis may mutter
"hints for advancing the investigation." When
there are developments in the investigation and an
announcement occurs, please pay
attention to the chat log.

<COL ffdc78>\"Enemies with Flaming Bodie.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>"Enemies with Flaming Bodies"</COL>
are enemies without physical form that continue to
wander while enveloped in flames even after death
and losing their bodies.
Because flames are constantly generated from their
bodies, if one gets too close for too long, they
will catch fire and spread.
They can be quite troublesome adversaries.

For some enemies with flaming bodies, yo.wrapped:
For some enemies with flaming bodies, you can use
skills with <COL ffdc78>healing effects on contact</COL> or capture
them with the Magick Eye: True Aid from Element
Archer to contain the flames emitted from their
bodies and put them in a <COL ffdc78>
"quenched state"</COL>.
In a quenched state, they will no longer catch
fire even if you get close to them.
In addition, the amount of damage inflicted
increases and there is also the benefit that the
enemy becomes more susceptible to
losing their balance.
So, healers should actively strive to put enemies
in the quenched state in their strategies.

<COL 78f5ff>The Land of Despair: Chapter.wrapped:
<COL 78f5ff>The Land of Despair: Chapter 4 - "Those Who Follow
the Dragon" Has Arrived!</COL>
"Believing in the bond with his mother,
the prince ran alone.
However, what awaited him beyond was a dragon
created to find pleasure in destruction.
After the battle, the power of the fire dragon
returned to its rightful place.
Acre Selund began to carve out a new history.
Meanwhile, a decision was made at The
White Dragon Temple."

One of the special attacks used by chara.wrapped:
One of the special attacks used by characters like
Volt Eye is an attack that attaches to the target
upon contact and causes damage after a certain
amount of time, resulting in
disadvantages for the target.
<COL ffdc78>If you receive such a disadvantage, you can be
relieved by receiving an attack from an ally.</COL>

After defeating the evil dragon and savi.wrapped:
After defeating the evil dragon and saving the
royal family, you are recognized as the next
dragon by the White Dragon.
The future battles will become even more fierce.
Strive to strengthen yourself, your equipment, and
the Myrmidons who support your journey.

<COL 78f5ff>A new entrance [The Abyss] h.wrapped:
<COL 78f5ff>A new entrance [The Abyss] has been added to
the Bitterblack Maze</COL>
<COL ffdc78>Go west from the landing. The guide Lucien is
waiting for you in front of the
entrance to the Abyss</COL>
The Abyss is a highly challenging route consisting
of 4 levels in total.
Do your best to clear it!

In the Abyss, you can obtain the <COL 78.wrapped:
In the Abyss, you can obtain the <COL 78f5ff>
Bitterblack Chest of the Farthest End</COL>, a new item
that grants special effects, and exchange it with
Bitterblack Maze Guide.
The Bitterblack Chest of the Farthest End can be
exchanged with Bitterblack Maze Guide for
Bitterblack equipment.

In a dungeon you have previously explore.wrapped:
In a dungeon you have previously explored, a
vortex of stagnation has appeared, causing various
<COL ffdc78>Mutations</COL>.
The objective of this content is to investigate
the Mutations within the dungeon and find and
destroy the source, the <COL 78f5ff>"Great Dragon
Crystal of Darkness".</COL>

In the Battle for the Destruction of the.wrapped:
In the Battle for the Destruction of the Great
Dragon Crystal of Darkness, various <COL 78f5ff>
mutations</COL> occur.
Investigating and resolving these mutations
becomes the mission.
There are five main types of missions:
<COL ffdc78>- Mission to defeat the enemies causing the
mutations - Mission to defeat the enemies that
have been consumed by darkness - Mission to
destroy the "Dragon Crystal of Darkness" - Mission
to defend the "Crystal of Blessing" - Mission to
mend the "Crystal of Blessing"
(*Exclusive to party play)</COL>

[Mission to defeat the enemies causing t.wrapped:
[Mission to defeat the enemies causing the
disturbances] Multiple enemies
will appear randomly.
Mission will be cleared by defeating all enemies.
[Mission to defeat the enemies mutated by
darkness] Enemies <COL ffdc78>strengthened by the power of
darkness</COL> will appear.
This is a high difficulty mission, but if you
achieve it, you can obtain <COL ffdc78>
additional special rewards</COL>.

[Mission to Destroy the Dragon Crystal o.wrapped:
[Mission to Destroy the Dragon Crystal of
Darkness] On the stage, the <COL 78f5ff>Dragon Crystal of
Darkness</COL> will appear.
Enemies that try to prevent the destruction of the
crystal will appear in the vicinity, but let's
work together with our comrades and aim
to clear the mission.
[Mission to Defend the Crystal of Blessing] On the
stage, the <COL 78f5ff>Crystal of Blessing</COL> will appear.
Enemies that try to destroy the crystal will
appear in the vicinity, so let's quickly defeat
the enemies and defend the crystal.

By clearing a certain number of missions.wrapped:
By clearing a certain number of missions, the
ultimate objective, the <COL 78f5ff>Great Dragon Crystal of
Darkness</COL>, will appear.
The Great Dragon Crystal of Darkness not only
summons enemies but also possesses
powerful magick of its own.
Destroying it may come with difficulties, but upon
destroying the Great Dragon Crystal of Darkness, <COL ffdc78>
an escape gate will appear in the dungeon,
allowing you to receive rewards.</COL>

In battles like the Battle for the Destr.wrapped:
In battles like the Battle for the Destruction of
the Great Dragon Crystal of Darkness, you can
obtain powerful armor imbued with the power of
dragons, called <COL ffdc78>Dragon Armor. </COL>
Equipping Dragon Armor enables the activation of
<COL ffdc78>Dragon Abilities</COL>, which serve as a means of
countering the dark servants in combat.
※ In the main quests, the power of Dragon Armor is
bestowed, and Dragon Abilities are
automatically activated.

Dragon abilities are bestowed upon drago.wrapped:
Dragon abilities are bestowed upon dragon armor.
Force/Spirit Dragon/Fire Dragon/White
Dragon/Anti-Black Dragon
<COL ffdc78>The ability is triggered when each point
meets a certain value</COL>.
The required points for activation are classified
into two calculation methods.
[Force] Calculated based on the
points of the wearer.
[Spirit Dragon/Fire Dragon/White Dragon/Anti-Black
Dragon] Calculated based on the total
points of party members.

Dragon Abilities Activated by \"Force\"\.wrapped:
Dragon Abilities Activated by "Force" [Dragon
Protection] Increases Physical
Attack/Magick Attack.
Increases Physical Defense/Magick
Defense during combat.
Status enhancement effects
increase with each level up.
[Dragon Blessing] Increases the rewards
obtained from boss battles.
Rewards increase further with each level up.

Counterattack of the Spirit Dragon\r\nWh.wrapped:
Counterattack of the Spirit Dragon When the enemy
attacks, if you attack the part that was attacked
or the weak point area around it, the <COL 78f5ff>Spirit
Dragon Counterattack Icon</COL> will increase. When the
icon is fully charged, the damage to destructible
parts will significantly increase.
Damage increases with each LV UP.

[Beast Slayer]\r\nWhen you deal a certai.wrapped:
[Beast Slayer] When you deal a certain amount of
damage to Abaddon's weak spot, it triggers a
follow-up attack that deals massive
damage to the enemy.
The damage of the follow-up attack
increases with each level up.

<COL ffdc78>Dragon Abilities: Spirit Dra.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>Dragon Abilities: Spirit Dragon</COL>
will wield its power against the Dark Servant
"Abaddon." The condition for activation is that
the total points of Spirit Dragons attached to
Dragon Armor must meet a certain value when
combined with the Party Members.

[Fiend Slayer]\r\nWhen you deal a certai.wrapped:
[Fiend Slayer] When you deal a certain amount of
damage to Baphomet's weak spot, it triggers a
follow-up attack that deals massive
damage to the enemy.
The damage of the follow-up attack
increases with each level up.

[Demon Bulwark of the Fire Dragon]\r\nCr.wrapped:
[Demon Bulwark of the Fire Dragon] Creates a
barrier that nullifies magick attacks in response
to the enemy's "Magick Attack Increase" buff.
While the barrier is active,
Strength/Magick/Exhaust Attack/Chance Attack are
increased, but the durability of the barrier
decreases when receiving magick
attacks or over time.
The durability of the barrier increases with each
level up, providing additional stat
bonuses and duration.

<COL ffdc78>Dragon Abilities: Fire Drago.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>Dragon Abilities: Fire Dragon</COL>
will unleash its power against the Dark Servant
"Baphomet." The condition for activation is that
the total points of Fire Dragons attached to
Dragon Armor, combined with the Party Members,
must meet a certain value.

<COL ffdc78>Dragon Ability: White Dragon.wrapped:
<COL ffdc78>Dragon Ability: White Dragon</COL>
will unleash its power against the dark
servant, "Black Knight".
The condition for activation is that the total
points of the White Dragon attached to dragon
armor, combined with the party members, must
meet a certain value.

[Bulwark of the White Dragon]\r\nCreates.wrapped:
[Bulwark of the White Dragon] Creates a barrier
that nullifies physical attacks in response to the
enemy's "Increase Physical Attack Power" buff.
While the barrier is active,
Strength/Magick/Exhaust Attack/Chance Attack are
increased, but the durability of the barrier
decreases when receiving physical
attacks or over time.
With each level up, the barrier's durability
increases along with the effect of stat boosts.

[Spirit Slayer]\r\nWhen you deal a certa.wrapped:
[Spirit Slayer] When you deal a certain amount of
damage to the Black Knight's weak spot, it
triggers a follow-up attack that deals major
damage to the enemy.
The damage of the follow-up attack
increases with each level up.

In the battle against the Black Dragon,.wrapped:
In the battle against the Black Dragon, the
effects of various Dragon Abilities that have
proven their strength in previous battles against
dark servants will be necessary.
Prepare dragon armor infused with the power of
<COL ffdc78>"Dragon Ability: Anti-Black Dragon"</COL> that allows
the activation of all Dragon Abilities and be
ready for the decisive battle
against the Black Dragon.

During the decisive battle with the form.wrapped:
During the decisive battle with the formidable
Black Dragon, a power called <COL ffdc78>"Power of
Destruction"</COL> accumulates.
This power increases when the Arisen receives
specific attacks from the Black Dragon. When the
Power of Destruction reaches its maximum, the
Black Dragon's strike will possess a power that is
more than enough to annihilate the Arisen.
<COL ffdc78>By attacking the exposed parts of the Black
Dragon's Dragon Force</COL>, it is possible to decrease
the Power of Destruction. Let's make good use of
this point in our strategies.

Dragon Ability Exclusive to \"Anti-Black.wrapped:
Dragon Ability Exclusive to "Anti-Black Dragon"
[Dragon Slayer] When you deal a certain amount of
damage to the weak points of the Black Dragon or
the Dragon Crystal summoned by the Black Dragon, a
follow-up attack that inflicts
significant damage will occur.
The damage of the follow-up attack
increases with each level up.

<COL 78f5ff>Wild Hunt</COL>\r\nis a cont.wrapped:
<COL 78f5ff>Wild Hunt</COL>
is a content where you accept requests to subdue
and defeat monsters that possess extraordinary
strength and size that do not normally exist, and
then go out into the field to
explore and defeat them.
You can receive and accept your desired requests
from a list that you can confirm by talking to
Lisa, who is in the Relay Station of the
White Dragon Temple.
<COL ffdc78>Although you do not gain experience points through
subduing and clearing, you can obtain a large
amount of play points.</COL>

In the Wild Hunt, there are <COL 78f5ff>.wrapped:
In the Wild Hunt, there are <COL 78f5ff> Ranks</COL> which determine
the difficulty level. The higher the rank, the
more challenging it becomes, but the
rewards also increase.
S Rank: The highest rank A Rank: High
rank B Rank: Normal rank
<COL ffdc78> In particular, S Rank is rarely given unless you
clear the Wild Hunt many times
and gain Lisa's trust.</COL>

The Wild Hunt begins with exploring the.wrapped:
The Wild Hunt begins with exploring the field and
searching for targets.
There are markers displayed on the mini-map to
indicate the range in which the targets can be
found, so let's carefully search the surroundings.
<COL ffdc78>As the rank increases, it becomes more difficult
to locate the markers that are
potential candidates.</COL>

[Bonus Target]\r\nInside the marker, the.wrapped:
[Bonus Target] Inside the marker, there may be
powerful enemies that are not the
target of extermination.
<COL ffdc78>It doesn't affect the progress of the quest if you
don't exterminate them, but you can earn play
points by defeating them.</COL>
When you encounter a bonus target, blue text will
be displayed at the top of the screen.

[Wild Hunt Requests]\r\nThere are two Wi.wrapped:
[Wild Hunt Requests] There are two Wild
Hunt requests per day.
<COL ffdc78>You can stock up to a maximum of 9 requests.</COL>
Requests accumulate even when you are not logged
in, so be careful not to let them overflow.
Also, if you reach the maximum stock and the next
day comes, the stock will not be updated and the
requests will remain the same.

[Notes for party play]\r\nThe Wild Hunt.wrapped:
[Notes for party play] The Wild Hunt can also be
played in a party, but
<COL ffdc78>only the party leader who has accepted the quest
can see the position of the
markers where enemies lurk.</COL>
Utilize features such as the Waypoint function on
the map to give instructions to party members.

Defeating the enemies in each combat are.wrapped:
Defeating the enemies in each combat area will
cause progress markers to appear.
If you gather at the progress marker, your own
flag will be set up, and a warp gate with a <COL ffdc78>
limited capacity</COL> will be unlocked.
The warp gate displays the name of the destination
stage, and when selected, you can confirm <COL ffdc78>how many
people can still move</COL>.
When a certain number of Arisen warp, the gate
itself will disappear.
Cooperate with your party members and
decide who will warp.

Divide into two groups: one to protect o.wrapped:
Divide into two groups: one to protect our army's
flag, and the other to Defeat the foe(s) appearing
in various locations.
Let's achieve the mission objective!
Once all battles in each area have concluded, we
will challenge the Black Knight seated
at the deepest point.

<COL 78f5ff>\"Spirit Dragon\" \"Fire Dra.wrapped:
<COL 78f5ff>"Spirit Dragon" "Fire Dragon" "White Dragon"
"Golden Dragon" "Anti-Black Dragon"</COL>
The Dragon Abilities mentioned above will have
their performance enhanced when <COL 78f5ff>the armor reaches
★4 through equipment strengthening.</COL>
If the points of the Dragon Abilities attached to
the armor are <COL ffdc78>"3 or less"</COL>, the corresponding
Dragon Ability points will increase.
If the points of the Dragon Abilities are <COL ffdc78>
"4 or above"</COL>, the Ability Points for
"Force" will increase.

<COL 78f5ff><Synthesis of Dragon Abiliti.wrapped:
<COL 78f5ff><Synthesis of Dragon Abilities></COL>
can improve the performance of <Anti-Black Dragon> Dragon Abilities
by combining <Black Dragon Equipment> with <Spirit Dragon Equipment>,
<Fire Dragon Equipment>, <White Dragon Equipment>, and <Golden Dragon Equipment>.
<COL ffdc78>However, the [Force] performance does not
improve during synthesis.</COL>

When you break down Dragon Equipment, yo.wrapped:
When you break down Dragon Equipment, you can
obtain some of the materials needed to
strengthen Dragon Equipment.
Disassemble any unnecessary equipment into
materials and use them for strengthening.
Additionally, the materials used for strengthening
can also be exchanged for new Dragon Equipment.

<COL 78f5ff>[Reward Missions] have been.wrapped:
<COL 78f5ff>[Reward Missions] have been unlocked!</COL>
<COL ffdc78>You can check the details of the Reward Missions
by talking to Lisa in the Relay Station District.</COL>
Depending on the number of missions you complete,
you can earn special rewards.
Among them, the <COL 78f5ff>[White Dragon Temple-issued Reward
Medal]</COL> can only be obtained through Reward
Missions. It is a special item.
Lisa will exchange it for various items.

In order to enter the <COL 78f5ff>\"Vort.wrapped:
In order to enter the <COL 78f5ff>"Vortex of Stagnation"</COL> where
the evil enemies reside, you will need <COL 78f5ff>"
<ITEM 24728>"</COL>.
This <ITEM 24728> can be obtained mainly by
conquering the <COL ffdc78>"Great Dragon Crystal War"</COL>.
After conquering the "Vortex of Stagnation", the
<ITEM 24728> will be destroyed in
exchange for rewards.

<COL 78f5ff>The Land of Despair Chapter.wrapped:
<COL 78f5ff>The Land of Despair Chapter 5: "The
Fate of All" Reached!</COL>
"The numerous calamities that suddenly struck the
world Believing, resisting, and not giving up hope
Protecting order with their companions It was not
a dragon or a king, but a lone Arisen The wounded
continent Now begins to walk towards their
respective futures—"

Regarding the Battle for the Destruction.wrapped:
Regarding the Battle for the Destruction of the
Great Dragon Crystal of Darkness, it is gathered
in the category of the Tutorial Guide: <COL ffdc78>Battle for
the Destruction of the Great Dragon
Crystal of Darkness</COL>.
If there is something you don't understand while
playing or if you have any concerns, first,
