The points granted during synthesis for
"Anti-Black Dragon" are determined by the Dragon

For reward missions, there are missions.wrapped:
For reward missions, there are missions that are
updated <COL 78f5ff>daily</COL> and missions that
are updated <COL 78f5ff> weekly. </COL>
<COL ffdc78>The rewards are also reset on the
day of mission update. </COL>
Let's challenge daily missions
to obtain all rewards.
<COL ffdc78>※ Clearing the The Great Dragon Crystal War does
not increase the number of clears
for extreme missions.</COL>

During the WM event, the Four Demon Gene.wrapped:
During the WM event, the Four Demon
Generals may appear.
Defeating them not only rewards a large amount of
DP, but also contributes to <COL ffdc78>unlocking conditions
for items in the shop</COL>. So, when the situation
changes, let's definitely challenge them.

Dragon abilities that can be activated b.wrapped:
Dragon abilities that can be activated by the
Spirit Dragon/Fire Dragon/White Dragon/Anti-Black
Dragon <COL ffdc78>are only activated during battles with

Dragon abilities that can be activated by force,
<COL ffdc78>have their effects activated in battles

※ The Dragon Armor of the Golden Dragon is only
effective for force addition and synthesis.

[Mission to Repair the Crystal of Blessi.wrapped:
[Mission to Repair the Crystal of Blessing] On the
stage, a <COL 78f5ff>Crystal of Blessing</COL> that has
been broken will appear.
<COL ffdc78>Grab the Blessing Fragments scattered around you,
and throw them towards the broken
Crystal of Blessing.
By doing so, the crystal will
gradually be repaired.</COL>
Once the Crystal of Blessing has returned to its
original form, the mission will be cleared.

The benefits of increasing trust include.wrapped:
The benefits of increasing trust include being
more likely to <COL ffdc78>receive high-ranking requests and
being able to receive up to a maximum of
three requests per day. </COL>
However, <COL ffdc78>be careful not to compromise trust</COL> by
holding onto maximum requests and carrying them
over to the next day.

You have struck down the Black Dragon, w.wrapped:
You have struck down the Black Dragon, who was the
source of all evil, and you protected the
order and the world.
The people of the continent, whom you have
touched, are moving forward, each
with their own wounds.
Let us continue to respond to the voices that need
you, And take a moment of rest, spending time with
comrades and Myrmidons, Enjoying a peaceful time.

You can exchange <COL 78f5ff>[<ITEM 2482.wrapped:
You can exchange <COL 78f5ff>[<ITEM 24821>]</COL>
at the High Orb Shop. Crafting recipes using it
will be unlocked by obtaining
various achievements.
<COL ffdc78>You can obtain achievements by clearing various
contents such as Bitterblack Maze, War Missions,

[Embrace of the Spirit Dragon]\r\nReduce.wrapped:

from Abaddon's attack.
The damage from <COL 78f5ff>Killer Ailbhe</COL> is reduced.

remaining health is low.

[Purification of the Fire Dragon] Shortens the
time until recovery when afflicted with the status
ailment of <COL 78f5ff>[Dark Flame].</COL>

or decrease with each application.

shortened with each level up.

[White Dragon's Edge] Knockdown Power increases in

When the armor is broken, while the enemy is off
balance, Strength/Magick/Exhaust Attack/Chance
Attack increase, triggering additional effects.

[Blow of the Golden Dragon] The Golden Dragon's

Interrupting the attack reduces the accumulation
of the Power of Destruction.

Destruction increases with each LV UP.

By clearing the mission, your chain will increase.
The chain will increase by +1 for <COL 78f5ff>
each mission cleared</COL>, up to a <COL 78f5ff>
maximum of 15 chains</COL>. However, it will decrease
in the event of the <COL ffdc78>
Arisen's death</COL> or <COL ffdc78>mission failure.</COL>

the higher the probability of
containing better rewards.

The rewards obtained upon clearing are a.wrapped:
The rewards obtained upon clearing are as follows:
<COL 78f5ff>[Chain Rewards]</COL>
An additional treasure chest for
every 5/10/15 chains.
<COL ffdc78>(*Once a treasure chest is added, it will not
disappear even if the chain count decreases.)</COL>

Clearing missions to defeat mutated enemies will
add rewards to the reward room.
<COL ffdc78>(*Collection points will be added as rewards.
*The more times you clear, the more
rewards you will receive.)</COL>

<COL 78f5ff>\"Daily Rewards\"</COL>\r\nS.wrapped:
<COL 78f5ff>"Daily Rewards"</COL>
Special treasure chests appear in the reward room
where you can obtain items once a day.
<COL 78f5ff>"Clear Rewards"</COL>
You can receive rewards from the storage box at
